S.FORM: == Anthony Bennett == Anthony Bennett hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska'. kawas tay 1993, ryax sa tay 14 nqu tay 3, Anthony Bennett, squliq na p'unro. pinqbaqan nya Anthony Bennett, t'aring kawas tay 2012 tehuk kawas tay 2013, mqwas biru sa UNLV pqwsan biru krahu. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == antħonj βennett == antħonj βennett ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pzjaŋ pkakiʔ taj ks~ɕkaʔ. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, antħonj βennett, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. pinqβaqan nja antħonj βennett, tʔariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** teħuk kawas~ɕ taj ****, mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa unl* pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: == Anthony Bennett == Anthony Bennett hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska'. kawas tay 1993, ryax sa tay 14 nqu tay 3, Anthony Bennett, squliq na p'unro. pinqbaqan nya Anthony Bennett, t'aring kawas tay 2012 tehuk kawas tay 2013, mqwas biru sa UNLV pqwsan biru krahu. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == antħonj βennett == antħonj βennett ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pzjaŋ pkakiʔ taj ks~ɕkaʔ. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, antħonj βennett, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. pinqβaqan nja antħonj βennett, tʔariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** teħuk kawas~ɕ taj ****, mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa unl* pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
